response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly detailed as 8+ years, his recent work at re:cinq and contributions to open-source GIS/data platforms suggest relevant expertise. His leadership in technical workshops and mentoring aligns with the role's requirements, though deeper cloud-specific AI production experience would strengthen his fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and modern AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP).
Proven leadership in technical discovery (workshops, mentoring) and cross-functional collaboration.
Strong open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective) demonstrating initiative and technical depth.
concerns: AI/GenAI production experience is not explicitly quantified as 8+ years in the resume.
Limited explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or cloud-native AI pipelines.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, though this is preferred, not required.
